\"auth_token\"]));\nconst AUTH_COOKIE_NAME = AUTH_TOKEN_KEY;\nconst AUTH_COOKIE_MAX_AGE = 60 * 60 * 24 * 7;\n\nfunction getCookieHost() {\n  return typeof window !== \"undefined\" ? window.location.hostname : undefined;\n}\n\nfunction getCookieDomain() {\n  return resolveSharedCookieDomain(getCookieHost());\n}\n\nfunction getCookieAttributes(persistent: boolean) {\n  const attrs = [\n    `Path=/`,\n    `SameSite=None`,\n    `Secure`,\n    persistent ? `Max-Age=${AUTH_COOKIE_MAX_AGE}` : undefined,\n    getCookieDomain() ? `Domain=${getCookieDomain()}` : undefined,\n  ].filter(Boolean);\n\n  return attrs.join(\"; \");\n}\n\nfunction writeCookie(token: string, persistent: boolean) {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  document.cookie = `${AUTH_COOKIE_NAME}=${encodeURIComponent(token)}; ${getCookieAttributes(persistent)}`;\n}\n\nfunction clearCookie() {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  document.cookie = `${AUTH_COOKIE_NAME}=; Path=/; Max-Age=0; SameSite=None; Secure${getCookieDomain() ? `; Domain=${getCookieDomain()}` : \"\"}`;\n}\n\nfunction writeToken(token: string, persistent: boolean) {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const primaryStorage = persistent ? window.localStorage : window.sessionStorage;\n  const secondaryStorage = persistent ? window.sessionStorage : window.localStorage;\n\n  for (const key of AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS) {\n    primaryStorage.setItem(key, token);\n    secondaryStorage.removeItem(key);\n  }\n\n  writeCookie(token, persistent);\n}\n\nexport function saveAuthToken(token: string, persistent = true) {\n  writeToken(token, persistent);\n}\n\nexport function readAuthToken() {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") \"@white-label/config\";\n\nexport const AUTH_TOKEN_KEY = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_AUTH_TOKEN_KEY ?? \"app_auth_token\";\nconst AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS = Array.from(new Set([AUTH_TOKEN_KEY, \"app_auth_token\", ].filter(Boolean);\n\n  return attrs.join(\"; \");\n}\n\nfunction writeCookie(token: string, persistent: boolean) {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  document.cookie = `${AUTH_COOKIE_NAME}=${encodeURIComponent(token)}; ${getCookieAttributes(persistent)}`;\n}\n\nfunction clearCookie() {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  document.cookie window.sessionStorage : window.localStorage;\n\n  for (const key of AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS) {\n    primaryStorage.setItem(key, token);\n    secondaryStorage.removeItem(key);\n  }\n\n  writeCookie(token, persistent);\n}\n\nexport function saveAuthToken(token: string, persistent = true) {\n  writeToken(token, persistent);\n}\n\nexport function readAuthToken() {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  for (const key of AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS) {\n    const persistentValue = window.localStorage.getItem(key);\n    if (persistentValue) {\n      return persistentValue;\n    }\n\n trimmed : `https://${trimmed}`;\n  const url = new URL(withScheme);\n  url.hash = \"\";\n  url.search = \"\";\n  url.pathname = url.pathname === \"/\" ? \"\" : url.pathname.replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n  return url.toString().replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n}\n\nfunction resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(names: readonly string[]): string | null {\n  for (const name of names) {\n    const value = process.env[name]?.trim();\n    if (value) {\n      return value;\n    }\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\nexport function requireEnv(name: string): string {\n  switch (name) {\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_RENDER_API_URL\":\n    case \"API_URL\":\n      return resolveApiBaseUrl();\n\n    default: {\n      const value = process.env[name]?.trim();\n      if (!value) return fail(name);\n      return value;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nexport function optionalEnv(name: string): string | null {\n  switch (name) {\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_RENDER_API_URL\":\n    case \"API_URL\":\n      return resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(apiBaseUrlCandidates);\n\n    default:\n      return process.env[name]?.trim() || null;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function resolveApiBaseUrl(): string {\n  const value = resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(apiBaseUrlCandidates);\n\n  if (!value) {\n    return fail(\"API_URL\");\n  }\n\n  try {\n    return normalizeBaseUrl(value);\n  } catch {\n    const fallback = value.trim();\n    if (fallback && !/^https?:\\/\\//i.test(fallback)) {\n      try {\n        return normalizeBaseUrl(`https://${fallback}`);\n      } catch {\n        // fall through to the explicit error below\n      }\n    }\n\n    throw new Error(\"Invalid API base URL in environment. Use a full https:// URL or a bare domain.\");\n  }\n}\n\nexport function resolveBaseDomain(): string | null {\n  const candidates = [\n    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_DOMAIN?.trim(),\n    process.env.BASE_DOMAIN?.trim(),\n  ].filter(Boolean) as string[];\n\n  for (const candidate of candidates) {\n    const normalized = candidate.replace(/^https?:\\/\\//, \"\").replace(/^app\\./, baseDomain = resolveBaseDomain();\n\n  if (baseDomain) {\n    return `.${baseDomain}`;\n  }\n\n  const host = hostname?.trim();\n  if (!host || host === 'localhost' || host === '127.0.0.1' || host === '::1') {\n    return undefined;\n  }\n\n  if (host.endsWith('.vercel.app')) {\n    return undefined;\n  }\n\n  const parts = host.split('.').filter(Boolean);\n  if (parts.length >= 2) {\n    return `.${parts.slice(-2).join('.')}`;\n  }\n\n  return undefined;\n}\n\nexport type ApiErrorPayload = {\n  error?: string;\n  message?: string;\n  details?: unknown;\n  status?: number;\n};\n\nexport class ApiError extends Error {\n  status: number;\n  details?: unknown;\n\n  constructor(message: string, status: number, details?: unknown) {\n    super(message);\n    this.name = \"ApiError\";\n    this.status = status;\n    this.details = details;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function isApiError(value: unknown): value is ApiError {\n  return value instanceof Error && (value as ApiError).name === \"ApiError\";\n}\n\nexport async function fetchJson<T>(endpoint: string, options: RequestInit = {}): Promise<T> {\n  const response = await fetch(`${resolveApiBaseUrl()}${endpoint}`, {\n    headers: (payload as ApiErrorPayload) : null;\n    const message =\n      errorPayload?.message && typeof errorPayload.message === \"string\"\n        ? errorPayload.message\n        : errorPayload?.error && \"@white-label/config\";\n\nexport const AUTH_TOKEN_KEY = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_AUTH_TOKEN_KEY ?? \"app_auth_token\";\nconst AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS = Array.from(new Set([AUTH_TOKEN_KEY, \"app_auth_token\", \"auth_token\"]));\nconst AUTH_COOKIE_NAME = AUTH_TOKEN_KEY;\nconst AUTH_COOKIE_MAX_AGE = 60 * 60 * 24 * 7;\n\nfunction getCookieHost() {\n  return typeof window !== \"undefined\" ? window.location.hostname : undefined;\n}\n\nfunction getCookieDomain() {\n  return resolveSharedCookieDomain(getCookieHost());\n}\n\nfunction getCookieAttributes(persistent: boolean) {\n  const attrs = [\n    `Path=/`,\n    `SameSite=None`,\n    `Secure`,\n    persistent ? `Max-Age=${AUTH_COOKIE_MAX_AGE}` : undefined,\n    getCookieDomain() ? `Domain=${getCookieDomain()}` : undefined,\n  ].filter(Boolean);\n\n  return attrs.join(\"; \");\n}\n\nfunction writeCookie(token: string, persistent: boolean) {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  document.cookie = `${AUTH_COOKIE_NAME}=${encodeURIComponent(token)}; ${getCookieAttributes(persistent)}`;\n}\n\nfunction clearCookie() {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  document.cookie = `${AUTH_COOKIE_NAME}=; Path=/; Max-Age=0; SameSite=None; Secure${getCookieDomain() ? `; Domain=${getCookieDomain()}` : \"\"}`;\n}\n\nfunction writeToken(token: string, persistent: boolean) {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const primaryStorage = persistent ? window.localStorage : window.sessionStorage;\n  const secondaryStorage = persistent ? window.sessionStorage : window.localStorage;\n\n  for (const key of AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS) {\n    primaryStorage.setItem(key, token);\n    secondaryStorage.removeItem(key);\n  }\n\n  writeCookie(token, persistent);\n}\n\nexport function saveAuthToken(token: string, persistent = true) {\n  writeToken(token, persistent);\n}\n\nexport function readAuthToken() {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  for (const key of AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS) {\n    const persistentValue = window.localStorage.getItem(key);\n    if (persistentValue) {\n      return persistentValue;\n    }\n\n    const sessionValue = window.sessionStorage.getItem(key);\n    if (sessionValue) {\n      return sessionValue;\n    }\n  }\n\n  const cookieValue = document.cookie\n    .split(\";\")\n    .map((part) => part.trim())\n    .find((part) => part.startsWith(`${AUTH_COOKIE_NAME}=`))\n    ?.split(\"=\")\n    .slice(1)\n    .join(\"=\");\n\n  if (cookieValue) {\n    return decodeURIComponent(cookieValue);\n  }\n\n  return null;\n}\n\nexport function clearAuthToken() {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  for (const key of AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS) {\n clearCookie();\n}\n"],"names":["AUTH_TOKEN_KEY","AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS","Array","from","Set","AUTH_COOKIE_NAME","AUTH_COOKIE_MAX_AGE","getCookieHost","undefined","getCookieDomain","getCookieAttributes","persistent","attrs","filter","Boolean","join","writeCookie","token","clearCookie","writeToken","primaryStorage","secondaryStorage","key","saveAuthToken","readAuthToken","cookieValue","clearAuthToken"],"mappings":";;;;;;;;;;AAEA;AAFA;;AAIO,MAAMA,iBAAiB,wCAA0C;AACxE,MAAMC,kBAAkBC,MAAMC,IAAI,CAAC,IAAIC,IAAI;IAACJ;IAAgB;IAAkB;CAAa;AAC3F,MAAMK,mBAAmBL;AACzB,MAAMM,sBAAsB,KAAK,KAAK,KAAK;AAE3C,SAASC;IACP,OAAO,sCAAgC,0BAA2BC;AACpE;AAEA,SAASC;IACP,OAAO,IAAA,+JAAyB,EAACF;AACnC;AAEA,SAASG,oBAAoBC,UAAmB;IAC9C,MAAMC,QAAQ;QACZ,CAAC,MAAM,CAAC;QACR,CAAC,aAAa,CAAC;QACf,CAAC,MAAM,CAAC;QACRD,aAAa,CAAC,QAAQ,EAAEL,qBAAqB,GAAGE;QAChDC,oBAAoB,CAAC,OAAO,EAAEA,mBAAmB,GAAGD;KACrD,CAACK,MAAM,CAACC;IAET,OAAOF,MAAMG,IAAI,CAAC;AACpB;AAEA,SAASC,YAAYC,KAAa,EAAEN,UAAmB;IACrD,wCAAmC;QACjC;IACF;;;AAGF;AAEA,SAASO;IACP,wCAAmC;QACjC;IACF;;;AAGF;AAEA,SAASC,WAAWF,KAAa,EAAEN,UAAmB;IACpD,wCAAmC;QACjC;IACF;;;IAEA,MAAMS;IACN,MAAMC;IAED,MAAMC;AAMb;AAEO,SAASC,cAAcN,KAAa,EAAEN,aAAa,IAAI;IAC5DQ,WAAWF,OAAON;AACpB;AAEO,SAASa;IACd,wCAAmC;QACjC,OAAO;IACT;;;IAEK,MAAMF;IAYX,MAAMG;AAaR;AAEO,SAASC;IACd,wCAAmC;QACjC;IACF;;;IAEK,MAAMJ;AAMb"}},

err.message : 'Login failed');\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-srf-bg flex items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"w-full max-w-md\">\n        <div className=\"text-center mb-8\">\n          <div className=\"w-20 h-20 bg-srf-primary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4\">\n            <span className=\"text-3xl font-orbitron font-bold text-white\">SF</span>\n          </div>\n          <h1 className=\"text-4xl font-orbitron font-bold text-srf-primary\">SrFix</h1>\n          <p className=\"text-srf-muted mt-2\">Panel de administracion</p>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"card p-8\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-center mb-6\">Iniciar Sesion</h2>\n\n          <form onSubmit={handleSupabaseLogin} className=\"space-y-4\">\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-sm font-medium mb-2\">Correo</label>\n              <input\n                type=\"email\"\n                value={email}\n                onChange={(event) => setEmail(event.target.value)}\n                className=\"input w-full\"\n                placeholder=\"dueno@taller.com\"\n                autoComplete=\"email\"\n                required\n              />\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-sm font-medium mb-2\">Contrasena</label>\n              <input\n                type=\"password\"\n                value={password}\n                onChange={(event) => setPassword(event.target.value)}\n                className=\"input w-full\"\n                placeholder=\"Tu contrasena\"\n                autoComplete=\"current-password\"\n                required\n              />\n            </div>\n            {error ? );\n}\n"],"names":["LoginScreen","router","searchParams","redirect","get","loading","setLoading","error","setError","email","setEmail","password","setPassword","handleSupabaseLogin","event","preventDefault","supabase","data","signInError","auth","signInWithPassword","trim","accessToken","session","access_token","Error","user","sucursalId","skipReload","push","err","message","className","onSubmit","type","value","onChange","target","placeholder","autoComplete","required","disabled","LoginPage","fallback"],"mappings":";;;;;AAEA;AACA;AACA;AACA;AACA;AANA;;;;;;;AAQA,SAASA;IACP,MAAMC,SAAS,IAAA,gTAAS;IACxB,MAAMC,eAAe,IAAA,sTAAe;IACpC,MAAMC,WAAWD,aAAaE,GAAG,CAAC,eAAe;IACjD,MAAM,CAACC,SAASC,WAAW,GAAG,IAAA,kXAAQ,EAAC;IACvC,MAAM,CAACC,OAAOC,SAAS,GAAG,IAAA,kXAAQ,EAAgB;IAClD,MAAM,CAACC,OAAOC,SAAS,GAAG,IAAA,kXAAQ,EAAC;IACnC,MAAM,CAACC,UAAUC,YAAY,GAAG,IAAA,kXAAQ,EAAC;IAEzC,MAAMC,sBAAsB,OAAOC;QACjCA,MAAMC,cAAc;QACpBT,WAAW;QACXE,SAAS;QAET,IAAI;YACF;;YAIA,MAAMQ,WAAW,IAAA,qLAAwB;YACzC,MAAM,EAAEC,IAAI,EAAEV,OAAOW,WAAW,EAAE,GAAG,MAAMF,SAASG,IAAI,CAACC,kBAAkB,CAAC;gBAC1EX,OAAOA,MAAMY,IAAI;gBACjBV;YACF;YAEA,IAAIO,aAAa;gBACf,MAAMA;YACR;YAEA,MAAMI,cAAcL,KAAKM,OAAO,EAAEC;YAClC,IAAI,CAACF,aAAa;gBAChB,MAAM,IAAIG,MAAM;YAClB;YAEA,MAAM,EAAEC,IAAI,EAAE,GAAG,MAAM,IAAA,+JAAiB,EAACJ;YACzC,IAAA,mKAAmB,EAACI,KAAKC,UAAU,IAAI,MAAM;gBAAEC,YAAY;YAAK;YAChE3B,OAAO4B,IAAI,CAAC1B;QACd,EAAE,OAAO2B,KAAK;YACZtB,SAASsB,eAAeL,QAAQK,IAAIC,OAAO,GAAG;QAChD,SAAU;YACRzB,WAAW;QACb;IACF;IAEA,qBACE,+YAAC;QAAI0B,WAAU;kBACb,cAAA,+YAAC;YAAIA,WAAU;;8BACb,+YAAC;oBAAIA,WAAU;;sCACb,+YAAC;4BAAIA,WAAU;sCACb,cAAA,+YAAC;gCAAKA,WAAU;0CAA8C;;;;;;;;;;;sCAEhE,+YAAC;4BAAGA,WAAU;sCAAoD;;;;;;sCAClE,+YAAC;4BAAEA,WAAU;sCAAsB;;;;;;;;;;;;8BAGrC,+YAAC;oBAAIA,WAAU;;sCACb,+YAAC;4BAAGA,WAAU;sCAAsC;;;;;;sCAEpD,+YAAC;4BAAKC,UAAUpB;4BAAqBmB,WAAU;;8CAC7C,+YAAC;;sDACC,+YAAC;4CAAMA,WAAU;sDAAiC;;;;;;sDAClD,+YAAC;4CACCE,MAAK;4CACLC,OAAO1B;4CACP2B,UAAU,CAACtB,QAAUJ,SAASI,MAAMuB,MAAM,CAACF,KAAK;4CAChDH,WAAU;4CACVM,aAAY;4CACZC,cAAa;4CACbC,QAAQ;;;;;;;;;;;;8CAG trimmed : `https://${trimmed}`;\n  const url = new URL(withScheme);\n  url.hash = \"\";\n  url.search = \"\";\n  url.pathname = url.pathname === \"/\" ? \"\" : url.pathname.replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n  return url.toString().replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n}\n\nfunction resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(names: readonly string[]): string | null {\n  for (const name of names) {\n    const value = process.env[name]?.trim();\n    if (value) {\n      return value;\n    }\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\nexport function requireEnv(name: string): string {\n  switch (name) {\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_RENDER_API_URL\":\n    case \"API_URL\":\n      return resolveApiBaseUrl();\n\n    default: {\n      const value = process.env[name]?.trim();\n      if (!value) return fail(name);\n      return value;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nexport function optionalEnv(name: string): string | null {\n  switch (name) {\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_RENDER_API_URL\":\n    case \"API_URL\":\n      return resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(apiBaseUrlCandidates);\n\n    default:\n      return process.env[name]?.trim() || null;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function resolveApiBaseUrl(): string {\n  const value = resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(apiBaseUrlCandidates);\n\n  if (!value) {\n    return fail(\"API_URL\");\n  }\n\n  try {\n    return normalizeBaseUrl(value);\n  } catch {\n    const fallback = value.trim();\n    if (fallback && !/^https?:\\/\\//i.test(fallback)) {\n      try {\n        return normalizeBaseUrl(`https://${fallback}`);\n      } catch {\n        // fall through to the explicit error below\n      }\n    }\n\n    throw new Error(\"Invalid API base URL in environment. Use a full https:// URL or a bare domain.\");\n  }\n}\n\nexport function resolveBaseDomain(): string | null {\n  const candidates = [\n    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_DOMAIN?.trim(),\n    process.env.BASE_DOMAIN?.trim(),\n  ].filter(Boolean) as string[];\n\n  for (const candidate of candidates) {\n    const normalized = candidate.replace(/^https?:\\/\\//, \"\").replace(/^app\\./, \"\").trim();\n    if (normalized) {\n      return normalized;\n    }\n  }\n\n  return null;\n}\n\nexport function resolveSharedCookieDomain(hostname?: string): string | undefined {\n  const baseDomain = resolveBaseDomain();\n\n  if (baseDomain) {\n    return `.${baseDomain}`;\n  }\n\n  const host = hostname?.trim();\n  if (!host || host === 'localhost' || host === '127.0.0.1' || host === '::1') {\n    return undefined;\n  }\n\n  if (host.endsWith('.vercel.app')) {\n    return undefined;\n  }\n\n  const parts = host.split('.').filter(Boolean);\n  if (parts.length >= 2) {\n    return `.${parts.slice(-2).join('.')}`;\n  }\n\n  return undefined;\n}\n\nexport type ApiErrorPayload = {\n  error?: string;\n  message?: string;\n  details?: unknown;\n  status?: number;\n};\n\nexport class ApiError extends Error {\n  status: number;\n  details?: unknown;\n\n  constructor(message: string, status: number, details?: unknown) {\n    super(message);\n    this.name = \"ApiError\";\n    this.status = status;\n    this.details = details;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function isApiError(value: unknown): value is ApiError {\n  return value instanceof Error && (value as ApiError).name === \"ApiError\";\n}\n\nexport async function fetchJson<T>(endpoint: string, options: RequestInit = {}): Promise<T> {\n  const response = await fetch(`${resolveApiBaseUrl()}${endpoint}`, {\n    headers: {\n      \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n      ...options.headers,\n    },\n    ...options,\n  });\n\n  const payload = (await response.json().catch(() => null)) as ApiErrorPayload | T | null;\n\n  if (!response.ok) {\n    const errorPayload = payload && typeof payload === \"object\" ? (payload as ApiErrorPayload) : null;\n    const message =\n      errorPayload?.message && typeof errorPayload.message === \"string\"\n        ? errorPayload.message\n        : errorPayload?.error && typeof errorPayload.error === \"string\"\n          ? errorPayload.error\n          : `HTTP ${response.status}`;\n\n    throw new ApiError(message, response.status, errorPayload?.details);\n  }\n\n T;\n}\n"],"names":["fail","name","Error","apiBaseUrlCandidates","normalizeBaseUrl","value","trimmed","trim","withScheme","test","url","URL","hash","search","pathname","replace","toString","resolveFirstConfiguredEnv","names","process","env","requireEnv","resolveApiBaseUrl","optionalEnv","fallback","resolveBaseDomain","candidates","NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_DOMAIN","BASE_DOMAIN","filter","Boolean","candidate","normalized","resolveSharedCookieDomain","hostname","baseDomain","host","undefined","endsWith","parts","split","length","slice","join","ApiError","status","details","message","isApiError","fetchJson","endpoint","options","response","fetch","headers","payload","json","catch","ok","errorPayload","error"],"mappings":";;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;AAAA,MAAMA,OAAO,CAACC;IACZ,MAAM,IAAIC,MAAM,CAAC,uCAAuC,EAAED,MAAM;AAClE;AAEA,MAAME,uBAAuB;IAC3B;IACA;IACA;IACA;CACD;AAED,SAASC,iBAAiBC,KAAa;IACrC,MAAMC,UAAUD,MAAME,IAAI;IAE1B,IAAI,CAACD,SAAS;QACZ,MAAM,IAAIJ,MAAM;IAClB;IAEA,MAAMM,aAAa,gBAAgBC,IAAI,CAACH,WAAWA,UAAU,CAAC,QAAQ,EAAEA,SAAS;IACjF,MAAMI,MAAM,IAAIC,IAAIH;IACpBE,IAAIE,IAAI,GAAG;IACXF,IAAIG,MAAM,GAAG;IACbH,IAAII,QAAQ,GAAGJ,IAAII,QAAQ,KAAK,MAAM,KAAKJ,IAAII,QAAQ,CAACC,OAAO,CAAC,OAAO;IACvE,OAAOL,IAAIM,QAAQ,GAAGD,OAAO,CAAC,OAAO;AACvC;AAEA,SAASE,0BAA0BC,KAAwB;IACzD,KAAK,MAAMjB,QAAQiB,MAAO;QACxB,MAAMb,QAAQc,QAAQC,GAAG,CAACnB,KAAK,EAAEM;QACjC,IAAIF,OAAO;YACT,OAAOA;QACT;IACF;IACA,OAAO;AACT;AAEO,SAASgB,WAAWpB,IAAY;IACrC,OAAQA;QACN,KAAK;QACL,KAAK;QACL,KAAK;QACL,KAAK;YACH,OAAOqB;QAET;YAAS;gBACP,MAAMjB,QAAQc,QAAQC,GAAG,CAACnB,KAAK,EAAEM;gBACjC,IAAI,CAACF,OAAO,OAAOL,KAAKC;gBACxB,OAAOI;YACT;IACF;AACF;AAEO,SAASkB,YAAYtB,IAAY;IACtC,OAAQA;QACN,KAAK;QACL,KAAK;QACL,KAAK;QACL,KAAK;YACH,OAAOgB,0BAA0Bd;QAEnC;YACE,OAAOgB,QAAQC,GAAG,CAACnB,KAAK,EAAEM,UAAU;IACxC;AACF;AAEO,SAASe;IACd,MAAMjB,QAAQY,0BAA0Bd;IAExC,IAAI,CAACE,OAAO;QACV,OAAOL,KAAK;IACd;IAEA,IAAI;QACF,OAAOI,iBAAiBC;IAC1B,EAAE,OAAM;QACN,MAAMmB,WAAWnB,MAAME,IAAI;QAC3B,IAAIiB,YAAY,CAAC,gBAAgBf,IAAI,CAACe,WAAW;YAC/C,IAAI;gBACF,OAAOpB,iBAAiB,CAAC,QAAQ,EAAEoB, {"version":3,"sources":["file:///Users/jesusvilla/Desktop/Sdmx-pagina-principal/apps/web-admin/src/lib/auth-storage.ts"],"sourcesContent":["\"use client\";\n\nimport { resolveSharedCookieDomain } from \"@white-label/config\";\n\nexport const AUTH_TOKEN_KEY = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_AUTH_TOKEN_KEY ?? \"app_auth_token\";\nconst AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS = Array.from(new Set([AUTH_TOKEN_KEY, \"app_auth_token\", \"auth_token\"]));\nconst AUTH_COOKIE_NAME = AUTH_TOKEN_KEY;\nconst AUTH_COOKIE_MAX_AGE = 60 * 60 * 24 * 7;\n\nfunction getCookieHost() {\n  return typeof window !== \"undefined\" ? window.location.hostname : undefined;\n}\n\nfunction getCookieDomain() {\n  return resolveSharedCookieDomain(getCookieHost());\n}\n\nfunction getCookieAttributes(persistent: boolean) {\n  const attrs = [\n    `Path=/`,\n    `SameSite=None`,\n    `Secure`,\n    persistent ? `Max-Age=${AUTH_COOKIE_MAX_AGE}` : undefined,\n    getCookieDomain() ? `Domain=${getCookieDomain()}` : undefined,\n  ].filter(Boolean);\n\n  return attrs.join(\"; \");\n}\n\nfunction writeCookie(token: string, persistent: boolean) {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  document.cookie = `${AUTH_COOKIE_NAME}=${encodeURIComponent(token)}; ${getCookieAttributes(persistent)}`;\n}\n\nfunction clearCookie() {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  document.cookie = `${AUTH_COOKIE_NAME}=; Path=/; Max-Age=0; SameSite=None; Secure${getCookieDomain() ? `; Domain=${getCookieDomain()}` : \"\"}`;\n}\n\nfunction writeToken(token: string, persistent: boolean) {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const primaryStorage = persistent ? window.localStorage : window.sessionStorage;\n  const secondaryStorage = persistent ? window.sessionStorage : window.localStorage;\n\n  for (const key of AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS) {\n    primaryStorage.setItem(key, token);\n    secondaryStorage.removeItem(key);\n  }\n\n  writeCookie(token, persistent);\n}\n\nexport function saveAuthToken(token: string, persistent = true) {\n  writeToken(token, persistent);\n}\n\nexport function readAuthToken() {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  for (const key of AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS) {\n    const persistentValue = window.localStorage.getItem(key);\n    if (persistentValue) {\n      return persistentValue;\n    }\n\n    const sessionValue = window.sessionStorage.getItem(key);\n    if (sessionValue) {\n      return sessionValue;\n    }\n  }\n\n  const cookieValue = document.cookie\n    .split(\";\")\n    .map((part) => part.trim())\n    .find((part) => part.startsWith(`${AUTH_COOKIE_NAME}=`))\n    ?.split(\"=\")\n    .slice(1)\n    .join(\"=\");\n\n  if (cookieValue) {\n    return {"version":3,"sources":["file:///Users/jesusvilla/Desktop/Sdmx-pagina-principal/apps/web-admin/src/lib/auth-storage.ts"],"sourcesContent":["\"use client\";\n\nimport { resolveSharedCookieDomain } from \"@white-label/config\";\n\nexport const AUTH_TOKEN_KEY = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_AUTH_TOKEN_KEY ?? \"app_auth_token\";\nconst AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS = Array.from(new Set([AUTH_TOKEN_KEY, \"app_auth_token\", \"auth_token\"]));\nconst AUTH_COOKIE_NAME = AUTH_TOKEN_KEY;\nconst AUTH_COOKIE_MAX_AGE = 60 * 60 * 24 * 7;\n\nfunction getCookieHost() {\n  return typeof window !== \"undefined\" ? window.location.hostname : undefined;\n}\n\nfunction getCookieDomain() {\n  return resolveSharedCookieDomain(getCookieHost());\n}\n\nfunction getCookieAttributes(persistent: boolean) {\n  const attrs = [\n    `Path=/`,\n    `SameSite=None`,\n    `Secure`,\n    persistent ? `Max-Age=${AUTH_COOKIE_MAX_AGE}` : undefined,\n    getCookieDomain() ? `Domain=${getCookieDomain()}` : undefined,\n  ].filter(Boolean);\n\n  return attrs.join(\"; \");\n}\n\nfunction writeCookie(token: string, persistent: boolean) {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  document.cookie = `${AUTH_COOKIE_NAME}=${encodeURIComponent(token)}; ${getCookieAttributes(persistent)}`;\n}\n\nfunction clearCookie() {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  document.cookie = `${AUTH_COOKIE_NAME}=; Path=/; Max-Age=0; SameSite=None; Secure${getCookieDomain() ? `; Domain=${getCookieDomain()}` : \"\"}`;\n}\n\nfunction writeToken(token: string, persistent: boolean) {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const primaryStorage = persistent ? window.localStorage : window.sessionStorage;\n  const secondaryStorage = persistent ? window.sessionStorage : window.localStorage;\n\n  for (const key of AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS) {\n    primaryStorage.setItem(key, token);\n    secondaryStorage.removeItem(key);\n  }\n\n  writeCookie(token, persistent);\n}\n\nexport function saveAuthToken(token: string, persistent = true) {\n  writeToken(token, persistent);\n}\n\nexport function readAuthToken() {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  for (const key of AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS) {\n    const persistentValue = window.localStorage.getItem(key);\n    if (persistentValue) {\n      return persistentValue;\n    }\n\n    const sessionValue = window.sessionStorage.getItem(key);\n    if (sessionValue) {\n      return sessionValue;\n    }\n  }\n\n  const cookieValue = document.cookie\n    .split(\";\")\n    .map((part) => part.trim())\n    .find((part) => part.startsWith(`${AUTH_COOKIE_NAME}=`))\n    ?.split(\"=\")\n    .slice(1)\n    .join(\"=\");\n\n  if (cookieValue) {\n    return (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const primaryStorage = persistent ? window.localStorage : window.sessionStorage;\n  const secondaryStorage = persistent ? window.sessionStorage : window.localStorage;\n\n  for (const key of AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS) {\n    primaryStorage.setItem(key, token);\n    secondaryStorage.removeItem(key);\n  }\n\n  writeCookie(token,   const sessionValue = window.sessionStorage.getItem(key);\n    if (sessionValue) {\n      return sessionValue;\n    }\n  }\n\n  const cookieValue = document.cookie\n    .split(\";\")\n    .map((part) decodeURIComponent(cookieValue);\n  }\n\n  return null;\n}\n\nexport function clearAuthToken() {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  for (const key of AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS) {\n trimmed : `https://${trimmed}`;\n  const url = new URL(withScheme);\n  url.hash = \"\";\n  url.search = \"\";\n  url.pathname = url.pathname === \"/\" ? \"\" : url.pathname.replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n  return url.toString().replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n}\n\nfunction resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(names: readonly string[]): string | null {\n  for (const name of names) {\n    const value = process.env[name]?.trim();\n    if (value) {\n      return value;\n    }\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\nexport function requireEnv(name: string): string {\n  switch (name) {\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_RENDER_API_URL\":\n    case \"API_URL\":\n      return resolveApiBaseUrl();\n\n    default: {\n      const value = process.env[name]?.trim();\n      if (!value) return fail(name);\n      return value;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nexport function optionalEnv(name: string): string | null {\n  switch (name) {\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_RENDER_API_URL\":\n    case \"API_URL\":\n      return resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(apiBaseUrlCandidates);\n\n    default:\n      return process.env[name]?.trim() || null;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function resolveApiBaseUrl(): string {\n  const value = resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(apiBaseUrlCandidates);\n\n  if (!value) {\n    return fail(\"API_URL\");\n  }\n\n  try {\n    return normalizeBaseUrl(value);\n  } catch {\n    const fallback = value.trim();\n    if (fallback && !/^https?:\\/\\//i.test(fallback)) {\n      try {\n        return normalizeBaseUrl(`https://${fallback}`);\n      } catch {\n        // fall through to the explicit error below\n      }\n    }\n\n    throw new Error(\"Invalid API base URL in environment. Use a full https:// URL or a bare domain.\");\n  }\n}\n\nexport function resolveBaseDomain(): string | null {\n  const candidates = [\n    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_DOMAIN?.trim(),\n    process.env.BASE_DOMAIN?.trim(),\n  ].filter(Boolean) as string[];\n\n  for (const candidate of candidates) {\n    const normalized = candidate.replace(/^https?:\\/\\//, \"\").replace(/^app\\./, \"\").trim();\n    if (normalized) {\n      return normalized;\n    }\n  }\n\n  return null;\n}\n\nexport function resolveSharedCookieDomain(hostname?: string): string | undefined {\n  const baseDomain = resolveBaseDomain();\n\n  if (baseDomain) {\n    return `.${baseDomain}`;\n  }\n\n  const host = hostname?.trim();\n  if (!host || host === 'localhost' || host === '127.0.0.1' || host === '::1') {\n    return undefined;\n  }\n\n  if (host.endsWith('.vercel.app')) {\n    return undefined;\n  }\n\n  const parts = host.split('.').filter(Boolean);\n  if (parts.length >= 2) {\n    return `.${parts.slice(-2).join('.')}`;\n  }\n\n  return undefined;\n}\n\nexport type ApiErrorPayload = {\n  error?: string;\n  message?: string;\n  details?: unknown;\n  status?: number;\n};\n\nexport class ApiError extends Error {\n  status: number;\n  details?: unknown;\n\n  constructor(message: string, status: number, details?: unknown) {\n    super(message);\n    this.name = \"ApiError\";\n    this.status = status;\n    this.details = details;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function isApiError(value: unknown): value is ApiError {\n  return value instanceof Error && (value as ApiError).name === \"ApiError\";\n}\n\nexport async function fetchJson<T>(endpoint: string, options: RequestInit = {}): Promise<T> {\n  const response = await fetch(`${resolveApiBaseUrl()}${endpoint}`, {\n    headers: {\n      \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n      ...options.headers,\n    },\n    ...options,\n  });\n\n  const payload = (await response.json().catch(() => null)) as ApiErrorPayload | T | null;\n\n  if (!response.ok) {\n    const errorPayload = payload && typeof payload === \"object\" ? (payload as ApiErrorPayload) : null;\n    const message =\n      errorPayload?.message && typeof errorPayload.message === \"string\"\n        ? errorPayload.message\n        : errorPayload?.error && trimmed : `https://${trimmed}`;\n  const url = new URL(withScheme);\n  url.hash = \"\";\n  url.search = \"\";\n  url.pathname = url.pathname === \"/\" ? \"\" : url.pathname.replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n  return url.toString().replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n}\n\nfunction resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(names: readonly string[]): string | null {\n  for (const name of names) {\n    const value = process.env[name]?.trim();\n    if (value) {\n      return value;\n    }\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\nexport function requireEnv(name: string): string {\n  switch (name) {\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_RENDER_API_URL\":\n    case \"API_URL\":\n      return resolveApiBaseUrl();\n\n    default: {\n      const value = process.env[name]?.trim();\n      if (!value) return fail(name);\n      return value;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nexport function optionalEnv(name: string): string | null {\n  switch (name) {\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_RENDER_API_URL\":\n    case \"API_URL\":\n      return resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(apiBaseUrlCandidates);\n\n    default:\n      return process.env[name]?.trim() || null;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function resolveApiBaseUrl(): string {\n  const value = resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(apiBaseUrlCandidates);\n\n  if (!value) {\n    return fail(\"API_URL\");\n  }\n\n  try {\n    return normalizeBaseUrl(value);\n  } catch {\n    const fallback = value.trim();\n    if (fallback && !/^https?:\\/\\//i.test(fallback)) {\n      try {\n        return normalizeBaseUrl(`https://${fallback}`);\n      } catch {\n        // fall through to the explicit error below\n      }\n    }\n\n    throw new Error(\"Invalid API base URL in environment. Use a full https:// URL or a bare domain.\");\n  }\n}\n\nexport function resolveBaseDomain(): string | null {\n  const candidates = [\n    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_DOMAIN?.trim(),\n \"\").trim();\n    if (normalized) {\n      return normalized;\n    }\n  }\n\n  return null;\n}\n\nexport function resolveSharedCookieDomain(hostname?: string): string | undefined {\n  const baseDomain = resolveBaseDomain();\n\n  if (baseDomain) {\n    return `.${baseDomain}`;\n  }\n\n  const host = hostname?.trim();\n  if (!host || host === 'localhost' || host === '127.0.0.1' || host === '::1') {\n    return undefined;\n  }\n\n  if (host.endsWith('.vercel.app')) {\n    return undefined;\n  }\n\n  const parts = host.split('.').filter(Boolean);\n  if (parts.length >= 2) {\n    return `.${parts.slice(-2).join('.')}`;\n  }\n\n  return undefined;\n}\n\nexport type ApiErrorPayload = {\n  error?: string;\n  message?: string;\n  details?: unknown;\n  status?: number;\n};\n\nexport class ApiError extends Error {\n  status: number;\n  details?: unknown;\n\n  constructor(message: string, status: number, details?: unknown) {\n    super(message);\n    this.name = \"ApiError\";\n    this.status = status;\n    this.details = details;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function isApiError(value: unknown): value is ApiError {\n  return value instanceof Error && (value as ApiError).name === \"ApiError\";\n}\n\nexport async function fetchJson<T>(endpoint: string, options: RequestInit = {}): Promise<T> {\n  const response = await fetch(`${resolveApiBaseUrl()}${endpoint}`, {\n    headers: {\n      \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n      ...options.headers,\n    },\n    ...options,\n  });\n\n  const payload = (await response.json().catch(() => null)) as ApiErrorPayload | T | null;\n\n  if (!response.ok) {\n    const errorPayload = payload && typeof payload === \"object\" ? (payload as ApiErrorPayload) : null;\n    const message =\n      errorPayload?.message && typeof errorPayload.message === \"string\"\n        ? errorPayload.message\n        : errorPayload?.error && window.location.hostname : undefined;\n}\n\nfunction getCookieDomain() {\n  return resolveSharedCookieDomain(getCookieHost());\n}\n\nfunction getCookieAttributes(persistent: boolean) {\n  const attrs ].filter(Boolean);\n\n  return attrs.join(\"; \");\n}\n\nfunction writeCookie(token: string, persistent: boolean) {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  document.cookie = (\n              <div className=\"rounded-lg border border-red-500/40 bg-red-500/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-red-300\">\n                {error}\n              </div>\n            ) : null}\n            <button type=\"submit\" className=\"btn-primary w-full\" disabled={loading}>\n              {loading ? 'Entrando...' : 'Entrar'}\n            </button>\n          </form>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nexport default function LoginPage() {\n  return (\n    <Suspense \"auth_token\"]));\nconst AUTH_COOKIE_NAME = AUTH_TOKEN_KEY;\nconst AUTH_COOKIE_MAX_AGE = 60 * 60 * 24 * 7;\n\nfunction getCookieHost() {\n  return typeof window !== \"undefined\" ? window.location.hostname : undefined;\n}\n\nfunction getCookieDomain() {\n  return resolveSharedCookieDomain(getCookieHost());\n}\n\nfunction getCookieAttributes(persistent: boolean) {\n  const attrs = [\n    `Path=/`,\n    `SameSite=None`,\n    `Secure`,\n    persistent ? `Max-Age=${AUTH_COOKIE_MAX_AGE}` : undefined,\n    getCookieDomain() ? `Domain=${getCookieDomain()}` : undefined,\n  ].filter(Boolean);\n\n  return attrs.join(\"; \");\n}\n\nfunction writeCookie(token: string, persistent: boolean) {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  document.cookie = `${AUTH_COOKIE_NAME}=${encodeURIComponent(token)}; ${getCookieAttributes(persistent)}`;\n}\n\nfunction clearCookie() {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  document.cookie = `${AUTH_COOKIE_NAME}=; Path=/; Max-Age=0; SameSite=None; Secure${getCookieDomain() ? `; Domain=${getCookieDomain()}` : \"\"}`;\n}\n\nfunction writeToken(token: string, persistent: boolean) {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const primaryStorage = persistent ? window.localStorage : window.sessionStorage;\n  const secondaryStorage = persistent ? window.sessionStorage : window.localStorage;\n\n  for (const key of AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS) {\n    primaryStorage.setItem(key, token);\n    secondaryStorage.removeItem(key);\n  }\n\n  writeCookie(token, {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  for (const key of AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS) {\n    const persistentValue = window.localStorage.getItem(key);\n    if (persistentValue) {\n      return persistentValue;\n    }\n\n    const sessionValue = window.sessionStorage.getItem(key);\n    if (sessionValue) {\n      return sessionValue;\n    }\n  }\n\n  const cookieValue = document.cookie\n    .split(\";\")\n    .map((part) => part.trim())\n    .find((part) => part.startsWith(`${AUTH_COOKIE_NAME}=`))\n    ?.split(\"=\")\n    .slice(1)\n    .join(\"=\");\n\n  if (cookieValue) {\n    return ].filter(Boolean);\n\n  return attrs.join(\"; \");\n}\n\nfunction writeCookie(token: string, persistent: boolean) {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  document.cookie = trimmed : `https://${trimmed}`;\n  const url = new URL(withScheme);\n  url.hash = \"\";\n  url.search = \"\";\n  url.pathname = url.pathname === \"/\" ? \"\" : url.pathname.replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n  return url.toString().replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n}\n\nfunction resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(names: readonly string[]): string | null {\n  for (const name of names) {\n    const value = process.env[name]?.trim();\n    if (value) {\n      return value;\n    }\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\nexport function requireEnv(name: string): string {\n  switch (name) {\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_RENDER_API_URL\":\n    case \"API_URL\":\n      return resolveApiBaseUrl();\n\n    default: {\n      const value = process.env[name]?.trim();\n      if (!value) return fail(name);\n      return value;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nexport function optionalEnv(name: string): string | null {\n  switch (name) {\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_RENDER_API_URL\":\n    case \"API_URL\":\n      return resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(apiBaseUrlCandidates);\n\n    default:\n      return process.env[name]?.trim() || null;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function resolveApiBaseUrl(): string {\n  const value = resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(apiBaseUrlCandidates);\n\n  if (!value) {\n    return fail(\"API_URL\");\n  }\n\n  try {\n    return normalizeBaseUrl(value);\n  } catch {\n    const fallback = value.trim();\n    if (fallback && !/^https?:\\/\\//i.test(fallback)) {\n      try {\n        return normalizeBaseUrl(`https://${fallback}`);\n      } catch {\n        // fall through to the explicit error below\n      }\n    }\n\n    throw new Error(\"Invalid API base URL in environment. baseDomain = resolveBaseDomain();\n\n  if (baseDomain) {\n    return `.${baseDomain}`;\n  }\n\n  const host = hostname?.trim();\n  if (!host || host === 'localhost' || host === '127.0.0.1' || host === '::1') {\n    return undefined;\n  }\n\n  if (host.endsWith('.vercel.app')) {\n    return undefined;\n  }\n\n  const parts = host.split('.').filter(Boolean);\n  if (parts.length >= 2) {\n    return `.${parts.slice(-2).join('.')}`;\n  }\n\n  return undefined;\n}\n\nexport type ApiErrorPayload = {\n  error?: string;\n  message?: string;\n  details?: unknown;\n  status?: number;\n};\n\nexport class ApiError extends Error {\n  status: number;\n  details?: unknown;\n\n  constructor(message: string, status: number, details?: unknown) {\n    super(message);\n    this.name = \"ApiError\";\n \"ApiError\";\n}\n\nexport async function fetchJson<T>(endpoint: string, options: RequestInit = {}): Promise<T> {\n  const response = await fetch(`${resolveApiBaseUrl()}${endpoint}`, {\n    headers: trimmed : `https://${trimmed}`;\n  const url = new URL(withScheme);\n  url.hash = \"\";\n  url.search = \"\";\n  url.pathname = url.pathname === \"/\" ? \"\" : url.pathname.replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n  return url.toString().replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n}\n\nfunction resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(names: readonly string[]): string | null {\n  for (const name of names) {\n    const value = process.env[name]?.trim();\n    if (value) {\n      return value;\n    }\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\nexport function requireEnv(name: string): string {\n  switch (name) {\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_RENDER_API_URL\":\n    case \"API_URL\":\n      return resolveApiBaseUrl();\n\n    default: {\n      const value = process.env[name]?.trim();\n      if (!value) return fail(name);\n      return value;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nexport function optionalEnv(name: string): string | null {\n  switch (name) {\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL\":\n    case \"NEXT_PUBLIC_RENDER_API_URL\":\n    case \"API_URL\":\n      return resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(apiBaseUrlCandidates);\n\n    default:\n      return process.env[name]?.trim() || null;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function resolveApiBaseUrl(): string {\n  const value = resolveFirstConfiguredEnv(apiBaseUrlCandidates);\n\n  if (!value) {\n    return fail(\"API_URL\");\n  }\n\n  try {\n    return normalizeBaseUrl(value);\n  } catch {\n    const fallback = value.trim();\n    if (fallback && !/^https?:\\/\\//i.test(fallback)) {\n      try {\n        return normalizeBaseUrl(`https://${fallback}`);\n      } catch {\n        // fall through to the explicit error below\n      }\n    }\n\n    throw new Error(\"Invalid API base URL in environment. Use a full https:// URL or a bare domain.\");\n  }\n}\n\nexport function resolveBaseDomain(): string | null {\n  const candidates = [\n    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_DOMAIN?.trim(),\n \"\").trim();\n    if (normalized) {\n      return normalized;\n    }\n  }\n\n  return null;\n}\n\nexport function resolveSharedCookieDomain(hostname?: string): string | undefined {\n  const '::1') {\n    return undefined;\n  }\n\n  if (host.endsWith('.vercel.app')) {\n    return undefined;\n  }\n\n  const parts = host.split('.').filter(Boolean);\n  if (parts.length >= 2) {\n    return `.${parts.slice(-2).join('.')}`;\n  }\n\n  return undefined;\n}\n\nexport type ApiErrorPayload = {\n  error?: string;\n  message?: string;\n  details?: unknown;\n  status?: number;\n};\n\nexport class ApiError extends Error {\n  status: number;\n  details?: unknown;\n\n  constructor(message: string, status: number, details?: unknown) {\n    super(message);\n    this.name = \"ApiError\";\n    this.status = status;\n    this.details = details;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function isApiError(value: unknown): value is ApiError {\n  return value instanceof Error && (value as ApiError).name === \"ApiError\";\n}\n\nexport async function fetchJson<T>(endpoint: string, options: RequestInit = {}): Promise<T> {\n  const response = await fetch(`${resolveApiBaseUrl()}${endpoint}`, {\n    headers: {\n      \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n      ...options.headers,\n    },\n    ...options,\n  });\n\n  const payload = (await response.json().catch(() => null)) as ApiErrorPayload | T | null;\n\n  if (!response.ok) {\n    const errorPayload = payload && typeof payload === \"object\" ? (payload as ApiErrorPayload) : null;\n    const message =\n      errorPayload?.message && typeof errorPayload.message === \"string\"\n        ? errorPayload.message\n        : errorPayload?.error && \"@white-label/config\";\n\nexport const AUTH_TOKEN_KEY = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_AUTH_TOKEN_KEY ?? \"app_auth_token\";\nconst AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS = Array.from(new Set([AUTH_TOKEN_KEY, \"app_auth_token\", \"auth_token\"]));\nconst AUTH_COOKIE_NAME = AUTH_TOKEN_KEY;\nconst AUTH_COOKIE_MAX_AGE = 60 * 60 * 24 * 7;\n\nfunction getCookieHost() {\n  return typeof window !== \"undefined\" ? window.location.hostname : undefined;\n}\n\nfunction getCookieDomain() {\n  return resolveSharedCookieDomain(getCookieHost());\n}\n\nfunction getCookieAttributes(persistent: boolean) {\n  const attrs ].filter(Boolean);\n\n  return attrs.join(\"; \");\n}\n\nfunction writeCookie(token: string, persistent: boolean) {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  document.cookie = persistent);\n}\n\nexport function saveAuthToken(token: string, persistent = true) {\n  writeToken(token, persistent);\n}\n\nexport function readAuthToken() {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  for (const key of AUTH_TOKEN_KEYS) {\n    const persistentValue = window.localStorage.getItem(key);\n    if (persistentValue) {\n      return persistentValue;\n    }\n\n
